title: nephrodium laxum
intro: Nephrodium laxum is a type of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium laxum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Nephrodium laxum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
